options.name: Option 1: Traction First
options.subject: Validating with VW Group + Closing Pre-Seed (SupraForge)
options.body:
Hi [Name],

[Blurb]Compliance is the single biggest bottleneck in automotive software, costing engineers 40% of their time.

We built **SupraForge ([PROJECT_NAME] AI)** to fix this—an AI "Quality Gateway" that automates compliance for safety-critical software.

**Why now?**

1. **Traction:** We are currently in validation talks with the **VW Group** and in commercial negotiations with **Audi**.
2. **Funding:** We are closing our **€190k Pre-Seed** round. A strategic industry partner (**Digital Gateway**) is finalizing their commitment, and we have room for one final ticket.
3. **Next Step:** Seed round targeting June 2026.

Instead of a static PDF, we’ve built an **Interactive Pitch Deck**. You can interview my autonomous AI proxy directly to vet our business model:

👉 [**Interview the Founder Proxy Here**](https://www.supra-forge.com/pitch-deck.html)

Best,

**Tobias Müller &**
**Jorian Bos**

CEO & CRO | SUPRAFORGE

[https://www.supra-forge.com](https://www.supra-forge.com)

options.name: Option 2: Tech-Forward
options.subject: Don’t read our deck—interview it. (SupraForge Pre-Seed)
options.body:
Hi [Name],

[Blurb]Most pitch decks are static. Since we are building the "Intelligence Layer" for automotive engineering, we made ours autonomous.

**SupraForge ([PROJECT_NAME] AI)** automates audit compliance for Tier-1s and OEMs. To prove our tech, I invite you to **interview our AI Founder Proxy**. It can answer your questions about our **VW Group validation** and our **€190k closing round** in real-time.

[**Click here to speak with the AI**](https://www.supra-forge.com/pitch-deck.html)

**The Deal:**

We are finalizing a strategic investment from a major technology partner. We are looking for one value-add investor to complete this Pre-Seed round before we scale toward our Seed raise in mid-2026.

Curious to hear your feedback on the AI.

Best,

**Tobias Müller &**
**Jorian Bos**

CEO & CRO | SUPRAFORGE

options.name: Option 3: Problem/Solution
options.subject: Automating the "Compliance Tax" (VW & Audi interested)
options.body:
Hi [Name],

[Blurb]Engineers in regulated industries (Auto/MedTech) spend 30-50% of their time on manual compliance documentation. It’s a massive waste of R&D budget.

**SupraForge** has built the solution: **[PROJECT_NAME] AI**. We integrate with existing toolchains (Jira, Polarion) to automate the audit trail in real-time.

**Momentum:**

1. **Product:** MVP is live.
2. **Market:** Validating with **VW Group**; negotiating with **Audi**.
3. **Round:** Closing €190k Pre-Seed now (Strategic Lead secured); Seed planned for June 2026.

I’d love to send you the details. You can also vet the opportunity instantly via our **Interactive Deck**:

[**See the Deck & Avatar**](https://www.supra-forge.com/pitch-deck.html)

Do you have time for a 10-minute intro call next Tuesday?

Best,

**Tobias Müller &**
**Jorian Bos**

CEO & CRO | SUPRAFORGE
